Pinball Rule Sheets

A repository of rulesheets for pinball machines

Home Master List Contribute Other

List of games with their current code number

This is a one stop reference list for games with their current code number. Any mistakes, additions, changes needed, or updates, please feel free to add.

  • Stern Pinball
  • Jersey Jack Pinball
  • Multimorphic
  • Barrels of Fun
  • Spooky Pinball
  • Pinball Brothers
  • Dutch Pinball
  • Turner Pinball
  • Vaults
    • Stern Vault
    • JJP Vault
    • Barrels of Fun Vault
    • American Vault
    • Spooky Vault
    • Pinball Brothers Vault
    • Dutch Vault
  • Legacy Tables
    • Williams / Bally Alphanumerics
    • Williams / Bally DMDs
    • Gottlieb / Premier DMDs
    • Data East Alphanumerics
    • Data East DMDs
    • SEGA DMDs
    • Stern Whitestar DMDs
    • Stern SAM DMDs
    • Stern SPIKE DMDs
    • Heighway Pinball
  • Unofficial Updates

    Stern Pinball

    Download code for all Stern pinball machines here. |Game Title | Latest Version | Release Date| |— | — | —| |Jurassic Park | 1.16 | Jul 1, 2026| |Stranger Things | 1.13 | Jul 1, 2026| |Godzilla | 1.14 | Jul 1, 2026| |James Bond 007 | 1.06 | Jul 1, 2026| |Venom | 1.07 | Jul 1, 2026| |Jaws | 1.02 | Jul 1, 2026| |John Wick | 1.02 | Jul 1, 2026| |The Uncanny X-Men | 0.98 | Jul 1, 2026| |Metallica Remastered | 1.04 | Jul 1, 2026| |Dungeons & Dragons: The Tyrant’s Eye | 1.01 | Jul 1, 2026| |King Kong: Myth of Terror Island | 0.97 | Jul 1, 2026| |Star Wars: Fall of the Empire | 0.97 | Jul 1, 2026| |The Walking Dead Remastered | 0.93 | Jul 1, 2026| |Pokémon | 0.84 | Jul 1, 2026| |Transformers: More Than Meets the Eye | 0.87 | Jul 1, 2026|

Multimorphic Pinball

Download code and release notes for all Multimorphic pinball machines here, or directly from the P3 connected to the internet.

Beta updates not listed (any one can opt in to installing them) |Game Title | Latest Version | Release Date| |— | — | —| |Barnyard | 2.1.0.0 | | |Bird Watcher | 1.2.2.2 | | |Blood Bank Billiards | 1.0.1.0 | | |Cannon Lagoon | 2.1.0.2 | | |Cosmic Cart Racing | 2.4.0.3 | | |Drained | 2.5.0.0 | | |Drained Bite-Sized | 1.0.0.1 | | |Dungeon Door Defender | 2.0.0.4 | | |Final Resistance | 1.2.0.2 | | |Flipper Foxtrot | 2.0.0.0 | | |Grand Slam Rally | 1.1.0.0 | | |Heist | 2.3.0.0 | | |Hoopin it Up | 2.0.0.2 | | |Lexy Lightspeed Escape From Earth | 2.1.0.0 | | |Lexy Lightspeed Secret Agent Showdown | 2.1.1.0 | | |Ranger in the Ruins | 3.0.0.2 | | |ROCs | 2.1.1.0 | | |Row Mania | 1.0.0.0 | | |Shoot n Scoot | 1.1.0.1 | | |Silver Falls | 2.0.0.1 | | |Sorcerer’s Apprentice | 1.1.0.0 | | |The Princess Bride | 1.1.7.0 | | |Weird Al’s Museum of Natural Hilarity | 1.5.3.0 | | |Young Martial Artist | 1.0.1.0 | |

Turner Pinball

Turner Pinball code can be viewed by clicking on updates. | Game Title | Latest Version | Release Date | Link | |—|—|—|—| | Ninja Eclipse - The Shadows Awaken | 0.9.5 | Aug 19 2025 | [NOTES] (https://turnerpinball.com/software-releases/ninjaeclipse_v0.9.5/update.md) [FILES both needed] https://turnerpinball.com/software-releases/ninjaeclipse_v0.9.5/update.enc https://turnerpinball.com/software-releases/ninjaeclipse_v0.9.5/update.sig | Merlin’s Arcade | 0.8.7 | Mar 26 2026 | [NOTES] (https://turnerpinball.com/software-releases/ninjaeclipse_v0.8.7/update.md) [FILES both needed] https://turnerpinball.com/software-releases/merlinsarcade_v0.8.7/update.enc https://turnerpinball.com/software-releases/merlinsarcade_v0.8.7/update.sig

Pinball Brothers

Scroll down and the code updates for Pinball Brothers releases can be viewed under Game Updates.

NOTE:

Staged Flipper functionality, meaning the lower and upper right flipper gets activated by separate opto switches on the flipper board. IF you experience any issues with the right flippers, upper or lower, after this update you can use the link to install the same version without the Staged Flipper functionality (NS = Not Staged).

1.0.1 Is just an hotfix not an full update file. Needs 1.0 installed 1st

Game Title Latest Version Release Date LINK HOTFIX LINK Change Log  
Predator 1.0.1 May 25, 2026 https://www.pinballbrothers.com/games/predator/updates/pbpp_predator_game_1_0.upd https://www.pinballbrothers.com/games/predator/updates/pbpp_predator_game_1_0_1.upd https://www.pinballbrothers.com/games/predator/updates/ https://pinballbrothers.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/80001185762-predator-game-updates

Dutch Pinball

Dutch Pinball code can be viewed by clicking on any product, then clicking Software Download on the right tab. | Game Title | Latest Version | Release Date | Link | |—|—|—|—| | Alice’s Adventures in Wonderland | 0.99-5 | Soon | Code |

Vaults

Vaults are reserved for companies who are still around, but whose games in this category aren’t currently being produced.

Stern Vault

Download code for all Stern pinball machines here.

Legacy Tables

Legacy tables are pinball machines released by companies that have since left the pinball industry, or have since moved on from DMD releases to LCDs. The code releases are presented here for safekeeping.

Williams / Bally Alphanumerics

Game Title Latest Version home version
High Speed L-4  
Grand Lizard L-4

Heighway Pinball

Game Title Latest Version Release Date Links
Full Throttle 1.41 July 28, 2016  
Alien 1.2 May 9, 2018 Code: http://pinballbrothers.com/updates/hpa12.upd
Release Notes: http://pinballbrothers.com/updates/hpa12-rn.txt
Only for machines with 1.0 or higher!

Unofficial Updates

Unofficial updates are updates released after-the-fact for tables that were believed to need improvement. Many of these were created by pinballcode.com for use with Data East & SEGA tables, and the Star Wars update was officially acknowledged by Stern Pinball on its release.

Please note, Most of these are only available as patch files, not as ROMs.

Game Title Latest Version Release Date Links
Batman Forever 5.00 Aug 2024 pinballcode.com
Baywatch 4.02 Dec 2025 pinballcode.com
Hook 5.01 Mar 2018 pinballcode.com
Jurassic Park 6.00 Oct 2015 pinballcode.com
Lethal Weapon 3 3.01 Sep 2020 pinballcode.com
Star Trek - 25th Anniversary 3.00 Apr 2020 pinballcode.com
Star Wars 1.07 Dec 2016 pinballcode.com
Tales from the Crypt 4.00 Oct 2015 pinballcode.com
Tommy 5.00 May 2016 pinballcode.com
TEENAGE MUTANT NINJA TURTLES 2.00 Nov 2025 pinballcode.com
X-Files 3.04 Sep 2023 pinballcode.com
Police Force LX-5 Dec 2025 https://pinballtherapy.com/rom-downloads/
Transporter the Rescue LX-4.1 Dec 2025 https://pinballtherapy.com/rom-downloads/
Diner Fixed_R_Ramp_Exploit Dec 2025 https://pinballtherapy.com/rom-downloads/
Star Trek: The Next Generation LX-9 Mar 2026 https://drive.proton.me/urls/S8K6313DW4#QQFCVH46kUaZ
